source.title: GMV Estimation Method 3: Third-Party Estimates (ECDB, Analyst Reports, Industry Data)

extractions.claim: ECDB ranks Pinduoduo at $817 billion GMV in 2025, making it the world's #2 e-commerce platform by GMV
extractions.evidence: According to ECDB data cited in ecommercebridge.com: 'Amazon ($845bn), Pinduoduo ($817bn) and Douyin, operated by ByteDance ($648bn), topped the global e-commerce ranking by GMV in 2025.' This $817B figure (~RMB 5.9T at 7.25 CNY/USD) represents total Pinduoduo platform GMV including domestic and may or may not include Temu.

verification.verifier_notes: ECDB is a respected e-commerce database. However, methodology not fully transparent. The $817B figure is higher than most analyst estimates of domestic-only GMV (4.5-4.8T yuan / $620-660B), suggesting it may include Temu GMV.

extractions.claim: Analyst consensus for PDD domestic GMV in 2025 clusters around RMB 4.5-4.8 trillion ($620-660B)
extractions.evidence: Multiple analyst theses: (1) PDD main app GMV projected at 4.7T yuan in 2025 (60% of Alibaba). (2) Another estimate: 4.5T yuan in 2025 at 10% CAGR from 2022. (3) In 2024, analysts expected PDD GMV to rise 23% YoY reaching 4.8T yuan. These are domestic Pinduoduo only, excluding Temu.

verification.verifier_notes: Aggregated from multiple analyst reports found via WebSearch. Individual analyst sources: Visible Alpha, Next Gen Investors (Substack), various sell-side notes.

extractions.claim: Temu crossed $50 billion GMV in 2025, with H1 2025 alone at ~$35 billion
extractions.evidence: Temu crossed $50 billion in GMV in 2025. H1 2025 GMV approximately $35 billion. ECDB reports temu.com generated revenue of $92.5B in 2025 (likely GMV, not net revenue). IPC data: Temu's share of cross-border ecommerce = 24% in 2025.

verification.verifier_notes: Temu GMV figures vary significantly across sources. The $50B figure is more conservative and widely cited. The $92.5B ECDB figure may use a different definition. US tariff disruptions in mid-2025 significantly impacted Temu's US business.

extractions.claim: METHOD 3 (Third-Party Consensus): PDD consolidated GMV in 2025 estimated at RMB 5.0-6.3 trillion ($690-870B)
extractions.evidence:
CALCULATION:
- Domestic Pinduoduo GMV: RMB 4.5-4.8T (analyst consensus)
- Temu international GMV: ~$50-70B = RMB 360-510B
- Total consolidated: RMB 4.9-5.3T (conservative) to RMB 5.3-6.3T (including higher Temu estimates)
- Cross-check with ECDB $817B: RMB 5.9T — within the upper range

RANGE: RMB 5.0-6.3 trillion consolidated ($690-870B)
DOMESTIC: RMB 4.5-4.8 trillion ($620-660B)
TEMU: RMB 360-510B ($50-70B)

verification.verifier_notes: Synthesized from multiple third-party sources. Domestic estimate is higher confidence (multiple analyst convergence). Temu estimate is lower confidence (rapidly changing business, tariff disruptions).
